notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Parker Messick. Trent Grisham to 3rd. José Caballero to 2nd. Trent Grisham advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Parker Messick.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Anthony Volpe reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Travis Bazzana. Jazz Chisholm Jr. scores.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Trent Grisham out at 2nd. José Caballero out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: José Ramírez singles on a ground ball to shortstop Anthony Volpe. José Ramírez to 2nd. José Ramírez advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Anthony Volpe.
